arts.ttl: Is Leeds United vs Stoke City on TV? Channel, live stream details and how to watch
arts.sum: Daniel Farke could secure Leeds United promotion to the Premier League on Easter Monday. Who are the Leeds United vs Stoke City officials?

arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs Stoke City as Daniel Farke makes Harry Gray decision
arts.sum: Daniel James did not look at ease after coming on against Oxford United on Good Friday amid his return from a hamstring injury and so he is replaced by Harry Gray in the matchday squad. Joe Rothwell's injury and Ampadu's presence in defence amid Pascal Struijk's absence means Ao Tanaka and Ilia Gruev start a fourth straight match.

arts.ttl: Leeds v Stoke in Championship and more from EFL: football – live
arts.sum: Updates from the 3pm BST games in the Football League Cardiff sack Riza and hand reins to Ramsey Get in touch – email Barry with your thoughts Cardiff City: The Welsh side are second from bottom of the Championship table and host Oxford United thisd afternoon. Following Saturday’s dismissal of Omer Riza, Aaron Ramsey has been given the job of keeping Cardiff up with just three games of the season remaining. The 34-year-old midfielder has not played for Cardiff since suffering the latest in a long litany of hamstring injuries in March. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Leeds United transfer news: £10m-rated Premier League goalkeeper to be targeted by Championship promotion contenders?
arts.sum: Leeds United have allegedly identified a Premier League goalkeeper - worth in the region of £10m - as a potential summer transfer target.

arts.ttl: Leeds United vs Stoke City live - Team news from Elland Road - Stoke-on-Trent Live
arts.sum: Leeds do not want to be playing in this division in August and are on the cusp of securing promotion back to the Premier League, sitting top and level on points with second-placed Burnley, five points ahead of third-placed Sheffield United going into this fixture with three games left to play. They are back at the bet365 Stadium for a home match against Sheffield United on Friday.

arts.ttl: Leeds United’s first confirmed summer sale could spark transfer theme for Farke
arts.sum: On the matter of spending limits, inside sources have told Leeds Live that the top brass at United know that every penny needs to count should promotion be secured. This year, Leeds find themselves on the cusp of automatic promotion with a squad that every other Championship manager envies.

arts.ttl: Leeds United News: Mateusz Klich wants ‘going up party’
arts.sum: Four points are needed for promotion from Leeds’ final three games, and with Sheffield United heading to Burnley in the evening, there’s every chance that Leeds may only need to get their job done today. Leeds United’s home clash against Stoke City today could be the fixture in which the Whites move within a point of automatic promotion, should all go to plan they could be promoted later in the evening too.
